LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. PLAINTIFF ANTHONY HELD'S MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER IS TO BE HEARD AT 9:00 AM ON THE DISCOVERY CALENDAR. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF ANTHONY HELD'S MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER - IT APPEARS THAT THE PARTIES HAVE AGREED TO ENTRY OF THE PROPOSED PROTECTIVE ORDER ATTACHED AS EXHIBIT I TO THE DECLARATION OF HARRISON POLLAK IN SUPPORT OF ATTORNEY GENERAL'S RESPONSE TO MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER. SEE PLAINTIFFS' REPLY AT 2:11-13)("PLAINTIFFS AGREE THAT THE PROPOSED PROTECTIVE ORDER ATTACHED TO MR. POLLAK'S DECLARATION IS ACCEPTABLE AND, THEREFORE, RESPECTFULLY REQUESTS THAT THE COURT ENTER THE PARTIES' PROPOSED STIPULATED PROTECTIVE ORDER").
